description: Baseline GA protection profile for experimental FBW tuning.

aoa_protection._note: stall_aoa_by_config values are PLACEHOLDERS — must be replaced with in-flight calibration data before AoA protection is meaningful. See calibration_mode block.

calibration_mode._note: Set enabled=true only for AoA calibration flights. IAS stall floor remains active. Reset to false after calibration.
